LanguageData.VCEV_NeedVariety.stages.0.description: I know this is the wasteland, but eating the same dreary slop every single day still wears a person down.
LanguageData.VCEV_NeedVariety.stages.1.description: Between diner staples, caravan finds, and campfire experiments, the menu around here stays surprisingly rich.
